breakdown: The PR adds XP progress tracking (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) to the rewards box visibility logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui, and updates related test imports to use the new session_header_utils module. Naming is solid with descriptive function names, and documentation is clear. However, the diff shows limited type safety (plain Python, no TypedDict visible) and minimal explicit error handling beyond basic type checking.
key_changes: Added XP progress tracking condition in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui visibility check
Updated docstring to document XP progress tracking behavior
Renamed ensure_level_up_rewards_pending to _check_and_set_level_up_pending in comments and docstrings
